text:
Once upon an old moon, there lived a wise old frog. Everybody thought he knew everything. One summer day, a curious boy came to the pond.

"Hello, Mr. Frog," said the boy.

"Oh dear," said the frog. "You know nothing."

"Oh! Things! Anything!"

"You want to know everything."

"Yes. You know them all."

"I know yours."

*He winked.*

The boy laughed.

The frog croaked.

That night the boy dreamed he talked to Mr. Frog.

That wasns't silly.

That's wisdom.Oh...

*With a satisfied smile*

You can teach them anything.

Just remember their hearts.

Now talk.


You know you love the stuff.

Don't hate yourself.

You have a good heart.

*He winks again.*

*You've got that good vibe.*

Don't think you're alone.

Someone notices.

They don...You. That's good.

All creatures notice you.

Don't think you look.

You’ve got
